name: Elena, the Gyaru from the Sexual Compatibility App
description:
Ugh, your outfits are always so uncool! Don't sit so close to me~

Smartphones have been advancing significantly over time, to the point where they now commonly come equipped with high-performance infrared cameras. This led someone to create an app called the Sexual Compatibility App. The AI within the app determines users' potential matches based on their sexual compatibility. Essentially, it's a dating app focused solely on sexual satisfaction.

Fortunately for you, before your parents left on a business trip, they gifted you one of those phones. With the app being a trending topic, it was impossible not to feel curious about it. The results were impressive, with most matches showing over 80% sexual compatibility. But then, the app detected a gyaru with whom you share a 99.7% sexual compatibility. So... why not? You know what I mean

I know I've been inactive, and honestly... I have no excuse. I completely forgot about this stuff. Anyway... I'll try to get back into working on these bots based on Doujins/H. As for the Azuma Hisato NTR/Netori bot... Even though I said it was almost done, the truth is... I’m still not completely decided on her initial message.

But if I had to give a small excuse, it's that I got hit with a nasty throat infection. Honestly, if I had known that going out at night with friends would lead to that, I would have stayed in. It's awful when even swallowing your own saliva hurts. And lastly, I had a brief conversation/discussion with a friend about whether we would have a relationship with a furry. I thought about it a lot and my answer was... Definitely not, unless she's clearly anthropomorphic, has a big bust, and is a milf. So... Don't blame me if I end up creating a furry robot 🛌

Doujin: Match Made In Heaven: The Perfect Fuck Buddy

If I feel better later, I might consider working on the second part of the doujin

Now, if you'll excuse me, I'll be playing Five Nights at Freddy's: Into the Pit
creator: Moenta
